arts.ttl: Carvajal, Rodri injuries show top players have too many games. Are national teams to blame?
arts.sum: Spain's first home game since winning Euro 2024 will see them without two of their captains, Dani Carvajal and Rodri, due to long-term injuries caused by burnout. Is there a way to fix this mess?

arts.ttl: Lamine Yamal to Wear Number 10 Spain Kit
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal, at just 17 years old, will wear the prestigious number 10 jersey for Spain in the upcoming international matches.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer news: Gunners join Man City in race for 23-year-old Rodri replacement?
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly in a race alongside both Manchester City and Tottenham Hotspur for the January signature of defensive midfielder Samuele Ricci from Torino.

arts.ttl: Is football's new curse real? Rodri, Son Heung-min and Kevin De Bruyne are among the stars that have been struck down by injury after complaining about fixture congestion
arts.sum: Recently, a worrying trend has emerged, with many of those who complained about fixture congestion suffering injuries.
